name: XP Golf
about: XP Golf is a golf simulation venue offering 24/7 automated play regardless of weather or time. The facility features multiple bays for play and provides a convenient indoor golf experience. Pricing is structured as $45 per hour for open bays and $60 per hour for private bays, with a booking system available for reservations.
why_golfers_like_it: No weather constraints for year-round play
Variety of bay options to suit different group sizes
